offer: For insurance claims managers processing 10–50 claims/month, delays in approvals cause cash flow gaps. We monitor claims timelines and flag delays instead of manual tracking of claims status.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for insurance claims managers
Indie Hackers discussions about claims processing tools
DM outreach to insurance claims managers with demo video
Engage in community forums for claims managers
try_it: Let users try real-time claims status updates on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path

Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Allow CSV import for existing data
